category_sources: source_facts.description says user-space file system for interacting with Google Cloud; Google Cloud docs describe Cloud Storage FUSE as mounting Cloud Storage buckets as local file systems.
display_name_sources: Google Cloud official docs use Cloud Storage FUSE; source_facts.name provides command name gcsfuse.
docs_sources: Official Google Cloud documentation provides overview and CLI reference for Cloud Storage FUSE/gcsfuse.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/gcsfuse; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; Google Cloud docs describe FUSE mounting of Cloud Storage buckets and gcsfuse CLI usage.
